resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def isPalindrome(self, s: str) -> bool:
        s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch.isalnum()).lower()
        return s == s[::-1]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a generator expression to filter out non-alphanumeric characters and convert the string to lowercase. It then checks if the resulting string is the same when reversed, which is done using slicing with a step of -1. The time complexity is O(n) because it needs to iterate over the input string once, and the space complexity is also O(n) because it needs to store the filtered string. The energy implications are low because it only uses basic string operations and does not require any complex computations.
